text:
The is one of several families that live within the Walls. It is the family where Eld Gin of the Special Operations Squad hailed from.

Story

Eve of the Counterattack arc

Eld Gin is first introduced as a member of the Levi Squad.

The 57th Exterior Scouting Mission arc

Eld later participates in the 57th expedition outside the Walls where he is killed while battling the Female Titan.

When news about the Scout Regiment's return is heard, the Gin family prepares for Eld's safe return.
